description.name: The Luminary Loft & Penthouse
description.headline: Stunning Loft with Panoramic Skyline Views & Private Terrace
description.description:
Experience the ultimate urban retreat in this architectural masterpiece. Featuring double-height ceilings and floor-to-ceiling windows, this penthouse floods with natural light.


Located just steps away from the cultural district, you'll enjoy unparalleled access to fine dining and transit options.

reviews: An absolute dream stay! The views at sunset are completely unmatched. The location was perfect for walking everywhere.
The apartment was pristine, and the host was incredibly responsive. Having a dedicated parking spot downtown was a lifesaver.
Beautiful design, but a bit of street noise can be heard on weekend nights. Overall, a 5-star experience.

policies.cancellation_policy: Full refund up to 5 days prior to arrival.
policies.payment_schedule: 50% deposit at booking, remaining balance due 7 days before check-in.
policies.damage_deposit: $300 holds on card required at check-in.

description.name: Serenity Bay Luxury Infinity Villa
description.headline: Oceanfront Luxury Estate with Private Pool & Chef services
description.description:
Welcome to paradise. Serenity Bay is a fully staffed ultra-luxury villa tucked into a cliffside overlooking the crystal waters of the Mediterranean.

Relax by our heated infinity pool or enjoy a custom meal prepared by your personal onboard chef.

reviews: Words cannot describe how beautiful this villa is. The staff treated us like royalty. We are already booking for next summer!
The kitchen setup is incredible, and the infinity pool views are surreal. Pure luxury from start to finish.

policies.cancellation_policy: Strict: Non-refundable within 30 days of check-in.
policies.payment_schedule: 100% payment required at time of booking.
